pbcoreDescriptionDocument.pbcoreTitle: Teaching Foreign Languages K-12: A Library of Classroom Practices
pbcoreDescriptionDocument.pbcoreDescription:
Neuman - b-roll #1 (Tape 1 of 2) TAPE # 405A PICK UP SHOTS IN THE CLASSROOM - THE MODEL VILLAGE 01:00:31: MCU of part of the model villagethe office of tourism in the foreground. 01:00:38: CU of model hotel. 01:00:47: CU of another building in the village. 01:00:54: CU of another building. 01:01:01: MS of two other buildings in the village. 01:01:04: Start a slow pan right from previous shot over to a MS of the plaza. 01:01:15: Start to pan back to the left, over to a CU of the roof of La Vie Du Chien. 01:01:30: Start to pan left to include another building in the shot. 01:01:37: CU of the second building in the last shot. 01:01:41: Pan back to the right, over the whole village, to the plaza. 01:01:54: CU of some shops (?) in the village. 01:02:00: Shot of several parts of the village, with the hotel in the background. 01:02:03: Pan left, behind one building, then rest on CU of a caf. 01:02:26: Redo of last pan.
GENERAL B-ROLL - CAFETERIA 01:02:38: Shot of knapsacks strewn on the floor of a large room w/ a large wooden bookshelf in the center. 01:02:44: Pan to the left to show students sitting at long tables, then pan back to the right to show empty hallways. 01:03:08: Pan back to the left to show kids at tables again. 01:03:22: Tighter shot of a group of 4 kids sitting at a table. 01:03:36: MS of three different students sitting at a table w/ tilt up to see a fourth student standing talking to them. 01:04:02: MS- three girls sitting at a table, studying and talking. 01:04:07: Tilt up to WS of a group of kids, standing, talking. 01:04:14: Tilt back down to girls at the table. 01:04:23: Tilt back up to standing kids. 01:04:29: MS of another group of kids sitting at a table, with one girl standinga few 01:of the kids wave to the camera. 01:04:46: Pan left to MS of two girls standing, talking, fixing hair, then pan back to students at table. 01:05:01: Shot of the back of the room, with coats and backpacks on shelves. Kids in the back on the left at the tables. 01:05:14: Tilt up from knapsacks on the floor to see some kids standing and talking.
GENERAL B-ROLL - GYM 01:05:24: FS of some girls playing basketball. Camera follows the action of the game. 01:06:22: Camera zooms out for the wider shot of the game. 01:06:33: MS of two girls standing against the wall cheering their teams on. 01:06:54: Back to WS of the game being played. 01:07:14: Zoom in to a girl taking a shot, then follow the action. 01:07:50: Boys playing basketball on the other side of the gymfollowing the action in MS. 01:08:31: Back to girls game- following the action. 01:08:45: MCU of ball going in the hoop. 01:08:54: Back to boys game, MS. 01:09:00: Zoom out for wider shot of the game, then back in to follow the ball.
GENERAL B-ROLL - OUTSIDE SCHOOL 01:09:18: Shot of exterior of the school. 01:09:27: Slow pan left to see the other side of the school. 01:09:41: Pan back to the right. 01:09:55: CU of the Peabody sign on the school. 01:10:03: Zoom out from sign to see the outside of the school again. 01:10:25: WS of outside of school, including the Peabody sign. 01:10:36: The sky, then tilt down to see the same WS of the school. 01:11:16: Shot of the sky, with tree branches to the left, and the roof of the school in the bottom of the screen. 01:11:58: Tilt down to see the front of the school, with a large group of students coming out one of the doors. 01:12:14: CU of Peabody sign, then tilt down to MS of students walking by the camera. 01:12:26: A few kids coming out of the door w/ pan over to Peabody sign & front of school. 01:12:43: Trees w/ sun shining through them, then tilt down to see kids getting on school buses out in the road. 01:13:08: Shot through wooden fence of kids walking to the buses w/ pan left to follow them, then tilt up to see kids in the windows of the buses. 01:13:22: Pan left down the line of buses 01:13:32: WS of the school driveway w/ buses in the road. Some kids walk by and wave to the camera. 01:13:54: MS of kids walking towards the camera as they come out of school. 01:14:50: WS of buses in front of school. 01:14:56: Tighter shot of kids standing next to bus, then zoom out to a wider shot again. 01:15:12: FS of kids walking down school driveway towards buses. 01:15:19: Three girls standing in a group, talking. 01:15:28: Same three girls in a wider shot, but with another girl standing in the foreground. 01:15:39: Same three girls, tighter shot.
GENERAL B-ROLL - BACK IN CLASSROOM 01:14:55: Wide shot of the village laid out on the floor of the classroom. 01:15:12: Pan to the right to see Ms. Neuman writing at her desk. 01:15:29: MS of Ms. Neuman from the front, writing at her desk. 01:15:34: Pull out from Ms. Neuman to reveal the village. 01:16:02: Slow zoom in to Ms. Neuman writing at her desk again. 01:16:23: CU of Mrs. Neumans hand as she writes, then tilt up to CU of her face. 01:16:54: CU w/ pan right of model buildings on Ms. Neumans desk, then tilt up again to MCU of her face. 01:17:19: MS of Ms. Neuman writing w/ models in the foreground. 01:17:32: Ms. Neuman standing up, getting a French book, then sitting down again. 01:17:49: CU of paper cameras and tourism badges on her desk, then back up to MCU of Ms. Neuman. 01:18:06: CU of a page of the French book. 01:18:32: CU of Ms. Neuman putting post-its on the pages of the French book (camera follows her hand). 01:18:43: MS of Ms. Neuman reading the French book.
TEACHER B-ROLL - IN HALLWAY 01:18:51: Camera follows Ms. Neuman walking down the stairs and past the room w/ the long tables. 01:19:13: CU of student artwork on a bulletin board, then Ms. Neuman walks by the camera into the office to get her mail. She stands and looks at her mail. 01:19:40: CU of clock on the wall at 3:55, then pull out to MS of Ms. Neuman putting her mail in her bag, and following her out of the office into the hallway. 01:20:05: Shot of outside of schoolsome kids walk by, then Ms. Neuman comes out the door and walks by. END OF TAPE
